### Python

- Performance profiling and optimization
- Testing with pytest

entities.name: Go
contexts: Go programming skills for high-performance microservices and CLI tools
Payment processing system handling 10k TPS using Python business logic and Go gateway
content_excerpts:
### Go

I started using Go 3 years ago for microservices. I appreciate its simplicity and excellent concurrency model.

Main use cases:
- High-throughput API gateways
- CLI tools
- gRPC services

### Payment Gateway

Built a payment processing system handling 10k transactions per second. Used Python for the business logic layer and Go for the high-performance gateway.
